# Video: 00:00.733 => 00:43.233
Width: 1080
Height: 608

Transcript
```
WEBVTT

00:01.360 --> 00:06.640
<Speaker 1>When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

00:07.120 --> 00:13.320
<Speaker 2>To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

00:13.440 --> 00:23.680
<Speaker 1>We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

00:24.040 --> 00:29.120
<Speaker 3>What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

00:29.600 --> 00:32.880
<Speaker 3>And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

00:33.680 --> 00:37.200
<Speaker 4>Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

00:38.680 --> 00:41.280
<Speaker 4>9555 request to end pushback received.
```

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and displays the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos, establishing the collaboration. It then transitions to a person discussing the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology, mentioning the creation of a universal TTS model trained on 3,000 hours of data to capture audio nuances and produce natural-sounding voices. Visuals include audio waveform graphics and shots of data centers and server farms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the service. The segment concludes with simulated airplane scenes and airport ground crew visuals, accompanied by realistic air traffic control communications, highlighting the integration of advanced TTS in flight simulation.

transcriptPhrases.text: When it comes to the neural TTS, in order to get a good voice, it's better to have good data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 2
transcriptPhrases.text: To achieve that, we build a universal TTS model based on 3,000 hours of data.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 1
transcriptPhrases.text: We actually accumulated tons of the data so that this universal model is able to capture the nuance of the audio and generate a more natural voice for the algorithm.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: What we liked about cognitive services offerings were that they had a much higher fidelity.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 3
transcriptPhrases.text: And they sounded a lot more like an actual human voice.

transcriptPhrases.speaker: Speaker 4
transcriptPhrases.text: Orlando ground 9555 requesting the end of pushback.

Summary.valueString: The video opens with a scenic aerial view of an island and displays the Flight Simulator and Microsoft Azure AI logos. It then transitions to a person discussing the importance of high-quality data for neural text-to-speech (TTS) technology. Visuals include audio waveform graphics and shots of data centers and server rooms, emphasizing the technological infrastructure behind the TTS model.

Summary.valueString: The segment shifts to vibrant aerial footage from the Flight Simulator, showing a red biplane flying over coastal and mountainous landscapes, including a castle. This showcases the realistic and immersive environments created by the simulator.
